hooks.command: input=$(cat); path=$(printf "%s" "$input" | grep -o "\"file_path\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\"[^\"]*\""); if printf "%s" "$path" | grep -q "apiClient"; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"src/api/apiClient/ is the generated Kiota client - never hand-edit it. Regenerate with: cd src/Tidansu.App && npm run build:api (after a fresh dotnet build of the API)."}}'; fi
